zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏弱平衡
zh.content:
当前SOL/美元整体维持窄幅整理结构，价格长期围绕66.80附近波动，日内振幅极小，市场处于明显的观望阶段。多空力量暂时均衡，缺乏持续性驱动，短线方向尚未有效选择，整体更偏向横盘修复走势。

从指标来看，价格略低于SMA20均线66.87，短线受均线压制但距离不大；MACD仍在零轴上方运行，显示基础动能尚未转弱，但上行动力明显减弱。缺乏RSI参考时，可判断为动能衰减后的整理阶段。

支撑方面关注66.70与66.50区域，若跌破可能进一步回踩区间下沿；上方阻力集中在66.87及67.20附近。操作上建议以区间思路为主，高抛低吸更优，等待放量突破后再跟随趋势方向介入。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently exhibiting an extremely tight consolidation phase, with price action compressed around 66.8. The lack of meaningful volatility over the last 24-hour suggests equilibrium between buyers and sellers. Despite minimal movement, the broader structure leans neutral-to-slightly bullish as price continues to hold near recent highs rather than retreating into lower support zones. This behavior indicates market indecision but with underlying stability.

Momentum indicators show a muted but slightly constructive bias. The MACD reading at 0.1404 remains marginally positive, implying weak bullish momentum, although the absence of a visible signal line limits confirmation strength. The 20-day SMA at 66.8695 sits just above the current price, suggesting Solana is trading slightly below short-term trend equilibrium and struggling to reclaim immediate trend strength. Overall.

Immediate support is forming around the 66.70–66.73 range, which aligns with the session low and acts as the first defensive zone for buyers. A break below this area could expose a drift toward 66.40. On the upside, resistance is clustered at the 66.87 SMA level, followed by a psychological pivot near 67.00, which must be reclaimed for stronger upside continuation.

Weak volatility conditions favor range-bound strategies, with scalping between support and resistance levels offering the highest probability setups. Traders may consider buying near 66.70 with tight risk control, while short-term rejection near 66.87–67.00 could present opportunities for fade trades. A decisive breakout above 67.00 would shift bias toward bullish continuation, whereas a breakdown below 66.70 would signal renewed downside pressure. Momentum remains neutral in the very short term.
